title: On Sight
lyrics: Niggas talk about finna lose my life Niggas ain't even worried I got some bad news I ain't talk Bout to lose your light So the niggas say they dropped the logo And so I pull up to his house and yeah I'm bout to let it blow Yeah I'm bout to let it blow Bout to lose your light So I'm finna take your life nigga Pull up with that Draco 4-5 nigga Ready to die nigga Bout to lose your light Why you surprised nigga Bout your name bitch Yes I'm over here doing bad things on my nigga Bout to lose your light Yes I'm real shit Oh shit bitch I'm trippin' I'm trippin' and racin' Your niggas is over here chasin' And I'm bout to go and blow it up Really nigga don't give a fuck Yeah really don't give a fuck I said Bout to let it blow Yeah it got that dirty clip Yeah I'm really with the shits nigga And yeah I'm tryna drink nigga I'm really with the shits nigga Word up Pass it, don't hope Pass it, don't choke Pass it, don't choke Pass it, don't choke I'm bout to put you six feet under Put you on a T-shirt and yeah I'm saying hey now Bout to lose your light Bout to lose your light Bout to lose your light Bout to lose your light I see Bout to lose everything It's your life nigga You ready to fight nigga I ain't playing ho I'm ready to KO Uh I'm ready to KO Uh Bout to lose your light It's your life nigga Yeah I'm ready to fight nigga I'm in this gang gang Yeah niggas like that hey hey Better run nigga Really don't wanna play play I'm all about that gang bang It's your life nigga It's your life nigga It's your life Uh I'm your life nigga I'm your life On site Don't be no nigga It's your time to fight Uh We gon' make it right We gon' make it up boy It's on site Yeah On site What he say? It's your life It's your life nigga You ready to fight nigga Ready to fight It's your life Yeah On site Pull it Tonight Tonight Tonight It's your life Thanks for watching!
